title: URAQT 70th Birthday Candles, Number 70 Candles, 3D Shape Gold Candle, Birthday Candle for Cake, Cake Topper Decorative for Anniversary, Wedding, Graduation Parties, Birthday Party
features: 🕯️【High-quality raw materials】Birthday candles are made of high-quality paraffin material. Easy to burn, odorless, smokeless, non-toxic, safe to use and easy to insert into the cake. Durable to ensure a stable flame throughout the party, allowing you to continue the celebration without worries.

🕯️【3D visual modeling】The vivid 3D modeling effect makes it look delicate and cute, the party candles are golden and bright, shining in the dark, complementing your cake and presenting the food better.

🕯️【Perfect size】The gold candle is 5 cm/1.97 inches long and the total length is about 11.6 cm/4.5 inches. It has the right weight and length, which can be well fixed on the cake or dessert. The right size can be used as a cake topper for most birthday and wedding cakes. Light it up to instantly bring life to your party and create unforgettable moments for all participants.

🕯️【Packaging and Craftsmanship】: Each birthday candle is individually packaged, which can provide good protection and reduce damage during transportation, can effectively prevent the candle from being crushed, and can meet your birthday party needs.

🕯️【Enhance the Atmosphere of the Party】Enhance the atmosphere of your event with this eye-catching golden candle, guaranteed to make guests of all ages smile and excited, and is an ideal cake decoration for many occasions such as birthdays, baby showers, anniversaries, retirements, family reunions, weddings and even Christmas.
description: Product description Product Description 70 Birthday Candle Birthday Features: 3D Exquisite Appearance: Happy Birthday Cake Candles are meaningful for you to celebrate your birthday, birthday candles impress your guests and make your birthday celebration memorable - it is the perfect choice to create unforgettable memories. Adaptable Venue: Ideal cake decoration for many occasions such as birthdays, baby showers, anniversaries, retirement parties, family reunions, weddings, Hawaiian parties, and even Christmas, a must-have item for party cakes, bringing you a memorable and meaningful party. Do not leave lit candles unattended. Please keep candles out of the reach of children. Do not light candles on or near flammable materials. When not in use, keep candle away from fire sources and require adult supervision when lit. Safety Warning Do not leave burning candles unattended. Please keep candles away from children.
